prompt_text:
### Demographics: 42-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 5 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
Heart failure: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Major Depressive Disorder
Rheumatoid Arthritis
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~5 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 89.1 kg; Height 178.1 cm; BMI 28.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 116/61 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.3%; 9 months ago 9.0%; 6 months ago 8.5%; 3 months ago 8.0%; current 7.2%), FPG (12 months ago 262mg/dL; 9 months ago 231mg/dL; 6 months ago 200mg/dL; 3 months ago 203mg/dL; current 174mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 89.1kg; 9 months ago 90.2kg; 6 months ago 89.2kg; 3 months ago 89.9kg; current 89.1kg), Height (12 months ago 178.1cm; 9 months ago 178.1cm; 6 months ago 178.1cm; 3 months ago 178.1cm; current 178.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 28.0kg/m²; current 28.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 116mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 64mmHg; 9 months ago 64mmHg; 6 months ago 61mmHg; 3 months ago 60mmHg; current 61mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 72U/L; 9 months ago 73U/L; 6 months ago 68U/L; 3 months ago 65U/L; current 69U/L), AST (12 months ago 69U/L; 9 months ago 69U/L; 6 months ago 75U/L; 3 months ago 76U/L; current 72U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 82mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 79mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 79mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 77mL/min/1.73m²; current 79mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 26mg/g; 9 months ago 27mg/g; 6 months ago 30mg/g; 3 months ago 27mg/g; current 32mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 88mg/dL; 9 months ago 87mg/dL; 6 months ago 83mg/dL; 3 months ago 82mg/dL; current 85mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 35mg/dL; 9 months ago 34mg/dL; 6 months ago 37mg/dL; 3 months ago 35mg/dL; current 36mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 93mg/dL; 9 months ago 110mg/dL; 6 months ago 108mg/dL; 3 months ago 109mg/dL; current 102mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.7g/dL; 9 months ago 12.6g/dL; 6 months ago 12.7g/dL; 3 months ago 12.7g/dL; current 12.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
